nasb.text: “You are the sons of the Lord your God; you shall not cut yourselves nor shave your forehead for the sake of the dead.

esv.text: “You are the sons of the Lord your God. You shall not cut yourselves or make any baldness on your foreheads for the dead.

cnv.text: “你們是耶和華你們的　神的兒女，不可為了死人割傷自己的身體，也不可使你們的額上光禿；

ccb.text: “你们是你们上帝耶和华的儿女，不可为死人割伤自己或剃光前额。
